title: campanula dasyantha subsp. dasyantha
intro: Campanula dasyantha subsp. dasyantha, also known as Bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Campanula dasyantha subsp. dasyantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antihistamine, making it a popular remedy for allergies and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its flowers are also used in floral arrangements and as a garnish in salads.
